title: Natural History Museum Becomes Top UK Tourist Spot
summary: In 2025, the Natural History Museum in London became the most visited tourist attraction in the UK. It had over 7.1 million visitors, which is 13% more than in 2024. This made it number one for the first time, beating the British Museum, which was top for the last two years. Other popular places included Windsor Great Park, Tate Modern, and the National Gallery. The Association of Leading Visitor Attractions said that visits to many sites are going up, but they are still lower than before Covid-19. The director of the Natural History Museum said they are happy and work hard to give visitors a great day out. People love learning about nature and culture, even when times are tough with money. The British Museum might have a good year soon because it will show the Bayeux Tapestry.

questions.correct_answer: It will show the Bayeux Tapestry

background_read: The Natural History Museum is a big museum in London where you can see fossils, animals, and learn about nature. Tourist attractions are places people visit for fun, like museums or parks. In recent years, Covid-19 made it hard for people to travel, so visits dropped. Now, more people are going out again, but some places still have fewer visitors than before. Museums work hard to make exhibits interesting for everyone.
Article_Structure: WHO: The Natural History Museum, British Museum, and other attractions like Windsor Great Park.
WHAT: The Natural History Museum became the top tourist attraction in the UK with 7.1 million visitors.
WHERE: In London and other parts of the UK.
WHY: Because people enjoy learning about nature and culture, and the museum works hard to provide good experiences.

perspectives.description: People choose to visit museums for fun and learning, even when money is tight.
